name: Multi LLM Query
description: The Multi LLM Query node is designed to query multiple large language models (LLMs) from providers such as OpenAI, Bedrock, and Gemini, using a DataFrame as input. It processes user queries, text content, and/or base64-encoded images to generate responses based on the selected model and task, producing a structured DataFrame output.
input: It may take in Dataframe as an input

fields.name: llmConnection
fields.title: Select Connection
fields.description: Select the configured LLM connection (OpenAI, Bedrock, Gemini, etc.) that provides authentication, model access, and provider-specific settings.

fields.name: temperature
fields.title: Temperature
fields.description: Controls response randomness and creativity. Lower values produce more deterministic outputs, while higher values encourage more diverse and creative responses.

fields.name: contentCol
fields.title: Content Column
fields.description: Column containing the primary text content to be processed by the selected LLM.

fields.name: imageCol
fields.title: Image Column
fields.description: Column containing base64-encoded image data used for multimodal (vision-enabled) LLM queries.

fields.name: inputMode
fields.title: Mode Selection
fields.description: Specify the input modality for the query: text-only, image-only, or combined text and image inputs.

fields.name: task
fields.title: Select Prompt

optionsMap.summary: Generate a concise, multi-level bullet-point summary capturing key facts, insights, and implications from the content. Preserve structure and section hierarchy.
optionsMap.translation: Translate the content into fluent, formal English while preserving tone, context, cultural nuances, and domain-specific terminology (e.g., legal, medical, technical).
optionsMap.topic_extraction: Identify and extract key topics, subtopics, and entities. Categorize them with tags (e.g., Person, Location, Concept) and provide brief descriptions or summaries of each.

fields.description: Select a predefined task template that determines how the LLM processes the input content.

fields.name: customPrompt
fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: Custom prompt text to override or extend the predefined task instructions.

fields.name: userQueryCol
fields.title: User Query Column
fields.description: Column containing user-specific queries or questions to be passed dynamically to the LLM.

fields.name: numPartitions
fields.title: Number of Partitions
fields.description: Number of Spark partitions to use for LLM execution. Tune for parallelism and throughput in large-scale workloads.

fields.name: fileNameCol
fields.title: File Name Column
fields.description: Column containing source file names, used when aggregating or grouping LLM responses by file.

fields.name: pageNumberCol
fields.title: Page Number Column
fields.description: Column containing page numbers, useful for preserving document structure during aggregation.

fields.name: timeout
fields.title: Timeout (seconds)
fields.description: Maximum time to wait for responses from OpenAI or Gemini APIs before terminating the request.

fields.name: thinkingBudget
fields.title: Thinking Budget
fields.description: Token budget allocated for model reasoning. Use -1 for dynamic allocation or specify an explicit token limit based on the selected Gemini model.
